title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 64.001 - Drainage and levee districts subject to flood plain management, when
text:
64.001.  Drainage and levee districts subject to flood plain management, when. — Any levee district organized pursuant to chapter 245, and any drainage district organized pursuant to chapters 242 and 243, are subject to any flood plain management regulations adopted by any county pursuant to this chapter.
(L. 1991 H.B. 72) 
Effective 3-04-91
